description: A plain candid close-up product/equipment photograph with no designed slogans or overlays (the only text present is the real printed agency label on the equipment, plus a manufacturer brand). It shows a white safety hard hat resting on a dark RealWear head-mounted wearable computer/AR camera unit on a polished wood surface. The hard hat bears a red-outlined rectangular decal reading 'United States Department of Labor / MSHA / Mine Safety and Health Administration' in blue; the small word 'realwear' is visible on the device band. The blurred background shows an office interior. This is a routine candid photo documenting MSHA's connected/AI safety equipment (paired with the same tweet about using AI to strengthen mine safety), not an agency-designed graphic or meme.
notable_text: United States Department of Labor / MSHA / Mine Safety and Health Administration (printed equipment decal)
